title: Epstein Files, Is SaaS Dead?, Moltbook Panic, SpaceX xAI Merger, Trump's Fed Pick
description:

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics including the Epstein files, the decline of SaaS stocks, Moltbook panic, SpaceX's merger with xAI, and Trump's new Fed Chair pick. The episode features guest Brad Gerstner, who shares his insights on these topics. The hosts also discuss their thoughts on the current state of the economy and technology.

takeaways.text: SaaS stocks are experiencing a decline
Moltbook is causing panic in the market
Trump has selected Kevin Warsh as the new Fed Chair
Brad Gerstner had a major win with Trump Accounts
The hosts discuss the implications of the Epstein files
The current state of the economy is uncertain
The merger between SpaceX and xAI could have significant implications for the tech industry

sentiment.notes: The hosts express caution about the current state of the economy and the implications of the Epstein files. However, they also discuss potential opportunities and wins, such as Brad Gerstner's success with Trump Accounts.

notable_moments.description: Trump's new Fed Chair pick announcement
